name: rAthena Board Metadata Reference Pack
title: rAthena Board Metadata Reference Pack
description: Curated metadata-only guidance for using rAthena Board as a conservative community hint source.
changelog: 2026-05-23: Added metadata-only board policy and community routing hints.
trustPolicy: Forum metadata is contextual only. Local project data and curated internal references have priority.
conflictPolicy: Board metadata never blocks alone and never overrides local evidence.

entries.title: rAthena Board metadata-only policy
entries.summary: Use rAthena Board only as metadata-only community context.
entries.details: The board may contribute section names, topic titles exposed on the homepage, public dates, and routing hints for support or documentation follow-up. It must not be crawled, paginated, copied as raw HTML, or treated as authoritative truth.
warnings: Forum content never blocks alone and always requires human review.

entries.title: rAthena Board community routing hints
entries.summary: Board metadata can help route support, database, scripting, source, client-side, and third-party topics for review.
entries.details: When a local issue requires broader community context, section metadata from the board can hint whether the problem belongs to database, scripting, source, client-side graphics, or third-party tooling review. This remains contextual only and should be summarized in sanitized form.
warnings: Do not follow topic links automatically or collect raw posts.
